title: User Login with Correct Credentials
description: Verify that users can successfully log in using valid username and password credentials and that session is properly established.

steps.description: Navigate to login page
Input valid username and password
Click on the login button
Confirm user is redirected to Financial Dashboard
Verify session provider has created a valid session

title: User Login with Incorrect Credentials
description: Verify that users cannot log in with invalid username or password and appropriate error messages are displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to login page
Input invalid or incorrect username and/or password
Click on the login button
Display authentication failure message
Ensure no session is established

title: Route Access Protection for Unauthorized Users
description: Ensure that unauthenticated users trying to access protected financial or account routes are redirected to the login page.

steps.description: Attempt to navigate directly to Financial Dashboard without login
User is redirected to login page
Attempt to access transaction management routes unauthenticated
Access denied and user is redirected

title: Financial Dashboard Data Consistency
description: Verify that all financial metrics, charts, and data points on the Financial Dashboard use centralized finance-engine calculations and are consistent across reports.

steps.description: Log in and navigate to Financial Dashboard
Check that values of financial metrics match outputs from the centralized finance engine
Verify visual charts represent current consistent data
Cross-check dashboard data with reports in Advanced Reports System

title: Create New Financial Transaction
description: Verify creation of a new transaction with all required details, proper validations, and persistence in the database.

steps.description: Navigate to transaction creation form
Fill all mandatory fields with valid data
Submit the transaction creation form
Confirm transaction is saved and visible in transaction list
Verify that finance-engine processes the new transaction correctly

title: Edit Existing Transaction with Validation
description: Verify editing an existing transaction enforces validations and updates are reflected consistently.

steps.description: Select an existing transaction from the hierarchy view
Open the edit modal and modify transaction details with valid changes
Save the changes
Confirm transaction updates visible in transaction list
Validate no disallowed operations occur outside finance engine

title: Delete Transaction and Verify Rollback
description: Verify a user can delete a transaction and that the system allows rollback, restoring prior state with full data consistency.

steps.description: Select a transaction and perform delete operation
Confirm deletion in modal
Ensure transaction is removed from UI
Trigger rollback operation
Verify transaction and all related financial calculations are reverted correctly

title: Bank Account View and Edit Operations
description: Verify users can view bank account details and histories, edit account information via modals with full validation, and see updates reflected.

steps.description: Navigate to bank account management section
Select an account and view transaction history
Transaction history is displayed with correct data and filtering where applicable
Open account edit modal
Update account details with valid data and save
Verify changes are reflected in account overview

title: Investment Portfolio Operations and Reporting
description: Validate adding new investments, processing dividend entries, selling investments, and generating investment reports work correctly with up-to-date data.

steps.description: Access investment dashboard
Add a new investment with all required details
New investment is visible and correctly calculated
Record a dividend payment in dividend modal
Dividend is reflected in investment returns
Initiate and complete investment sale operation
Sold investment is removed and sale report is generated
Generate investment report
Report data matches portfolio status and finance engine outputs

title: Budget Planning and Performance Analysis
description: Test configuration of budgets using smart budget config, viewing budget insights and performance analysis graphs with accurate data.

steps.description: Open Budget Planning suite
Configure a new smart budget plan with parameter inputs
Budget plan is saved and listed
Access budget insights and performance analysis dashboards
Display reflects accurate budget usage and variances

title: Complete Travel Management Workflow
description: Validate creation of a travel trip, tracking expenses including multiple currencies, viewing itinerary details, and generating expense reports.

steps.description: Create a new trip with itinerary
Trip is listed in travel dashboard
Add travel expenses with different currencies
Expenses reflect correct currency conversion and totals
View detailed trip itinerary
Itinerary details match input and display properly
Generate trip expense report
Report shows accurate aggregated travel expenses

title: Notification and Reminder System Functionality
description: Ensure notifications and reminders are generated, displayed, and can be configured by users in the notification center.

steps.description: Trigger a notification event (e.g., transaction due reminder)
Notification appears in smart notification center
Configure user preferences for reminders
Schedule a reminder and verify delivery
Reminders appear at scheduled time and can be dismissed

title: Security System Monitoring and Backup Verification
description: Validate real-time security monitoring dashboards show accurate status of protection mechanisms and backups can be created and restored.

steps.description: Access the security monitoring dashboard
Dashboard displays current system protection status and audit logs
Initiate a system backup via backup manager
Backup is created successfully with confirmation message
Perform backup restore operation
System state is restored to backup point without data loss

title: Progressive Web App Offline Mode and Settings
description: Verify PWA features enable users to continue offline access, perform actions with cached data, and update advanced PWA settings.

steps.description: Load the app and then switch to offline mode
Core UI and cached financial data remains accessible
Attempt to create or view data relying on offline cache
App functions gracefully handling offline conditions
Access advanced PWA settings and update preferences
Settings changes persist and apply correctly

title: UI Components Accessibility and Performance
description: Verify core reusable UI components (buttons, inputs, dialogs, tables) meet accessibility standards and perform within acceptable benchmarks.

steps.description: Render each UI component separately and within workflows
Check keyboard navigability and screen reader labels
Verify color contrast and focus indicators
Perform performance profiling ensuring components render within required time limits

title: Shared Expenses Collaborative Operations
description: Test creating shared expenses, adding multiple participants, splitting costs, and verifying debt calculations are accurate and updated.

steps.description: Open shared expenses module
Create a new shared expense and add participants
Define expense amounts and split rules
Expense distribution and debts between participants are calculated correctly
Edit shared expense and recalculate
Updates propagate correctly to shared debts display

title: Date Picker and Calendar Component Uniform Date Format
description: Ensure that all date pickers and calendar components use the standardized date utility formatting consistently across the app.

steps.description: Open date picker component in various input forms
Select dates and view formatted output
Dates are displayed using standardized format across all UI instances
Check calendar component date rendering
Date highlights and formats remain consistent

title: Data Visualization Components Display and Interaction
description: Verify that interactive charts and visual cash flow projections render accurate data and respond properly to user interactions.

steps.description: Navigate to dashboards featuring data visualization components
Charts display current financial data correctly
Interact with charts (hover, zoom, filter)
Visualizations respond smoothly and update data views accordingly

title: Linting Rules Enforcement for Transaction Data Handling
description: Ensure ESLint and custom lint rules prevent usage of disallowed array operations (reduce, map, filter) on transaction data outside the finance engine modules.

steps.description: Run lint checks on the codebase
No violations of disallowed operations on transaction data outside finance engine
Attempt to introduce disallowed operation in transaction component source files
Lint fails with appropriate error messages

title: Transform Validation Scripts Activation
description: Validate archived transform validation scripts have been migrated to active codebase and detect orphaned or incomplete transactions in real-time.

steps.description: Trigger batch or real-time validation process
Validation detects orphaned transactions correctly
Reports or logs are generated indicating validation status

title: Automated End-to-End Critical Transaction Flow Testing
description: Execute automated Playwright tests to verify creation, edition, deletion, and rollback of financial transactions ensuring data consistency across UI and backend.

steps.description: Run end-to-end test suite on transaction flows
Transactions are created, edited, deleted, and rolled back without errors
UI and database state remain synchronized

title: CSS Selectors Stability for Automated Tests
description: Ensure all automated tests use valid and stable CSS selectors to prevent failures from UI modifications.

steps.description: Review automated test selectors for login, dashboard, and transaction components
Selectors are stable and consistent with UI codebase
Modify a selector in UI and observe test failures
Update selectors promptly restores test success
